CREATE TABLE tab64 (event_id UInt8, time Time64(3)) ENGINE = TinyLog;
SELECT * FROM tab64 WHERE time = toTime64('00:00:00.000', 3);
SELECT * FROM tab64 WHERE time > toTime64('14:30:25', 3);
SELECT * FROM tab64 WHERE time < toTime64('-999:59:59', 3);
SELECT event_id FROM tab64 WHERE time BETWEEN toTime64('00:00:00', 3) AND toTime64('14:30:25', 3);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tab64 WHERE time IS NOT NULL;
INSERT INTO tab64_copy SELECT * FROM tab64 WHERE time IS NOT NULL;
SELECT a.event_id, b.time FROM tab64 a JOIN tab64_copy b ON a.event_id = b.event_id WHERE a.time = toTime64('14:30:25', 3);
SELECT * FROM (SELECT event_id, time FROM tab64 WHERE time > toTime64('-01:00:00', 3)) AS subquery WHERE time <= toTime64('999:59:59', 3);
SELECT CAST('999:59:59.999' AS Time64(3)) AS max_time, CAST('-999:59:59.000' AS Time64(3)) AS min_time;
SELECT SUM(event_id) FROM tab64 WHERE time = toTime64('25:70:70', 3);
